testcase.name: test_rss_valid

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='ownership-dev.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/cellar-journal/rss.xml (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='ownership-dev.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf8409effad50>, 'Connection to ownership-dev.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=10)'))

testcase.failure:
